name: unified-terminal
description: Desktop app wrapping CLI AI tools for non-technical users

scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.test:unit: npx ts-node tests/task-router.test.ts && npx ts-node tests/intake.test.ts && npx ts-node tests/cli-runner.test.ts && npx ts-node tests/system-scanner.test.ts && npx ts-node tests/codex-adapter.test.ts && npx ts-node tests/fast-path.test.ts && npx ts-node tests/conductor.test.ts && npx ts-node tests/step-scheduler.test.ts && npx ts-node tests/cli-auth.test.ts && npx ts-node tests/claude-adapter.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:compat
